code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut i = 0
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut parsed = 0

while parsed < 2 and i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(ch)
    if ch == 32 or ch == 9 or ch == 10 or ch == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut num = 0
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          match string.byte_at(input, i)
          when Some(d)
            if d >= 48 and d <= 57
              num = num * 10 + (d - 48)
              i = i + 1
            else
              done = true
            end
          when None
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      if parsed == 0
        a = num
      else
        b = num
      end
      parsed = parsed + 1
    end
  when None
    i = i + 1
  end
end

mut x = a
mut y = b
while y != 0
  let t = y
  y = x % y
  x = t
end

print("gcd=#{x}")
